mapper.sql: select tenant_id, tenant_name, tenant_code, pinyin_code, status, planned_stop_time, contact_person, contact_phone, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, del_by, del_time, remark from scm_tenant
mapper.select:
del_flag = '0' and tenant_name like concat('%', #{tenantName}, '%') and tenant_code like concat('%', #{tenantCode}, '%') and pinyin_code like concat('%', #{pinyinCode}, '%') and status = #{status}
order by create_time desc
mapper.insert: insert into scm_tenant (tenant_id, tenant_name, tenant_code, pinyin_code, status, planned_stop_time, contact_person, contact_phone, create_by, create_time, remark) values (#{tenantId}, #{tenantName}, #{tenantCode}, #{pinyinCode}, #{status}, #{plannedStopTime}, #{contactPerson}, #{contactPhone}, #{createBy}, now(), #{remark})
mapper.update: update scm_tenant set del_flag = '2', del_time = now() where tenant_id = #{tenantId}
update scm_tenant set del_flag = '2' where tenant_id in #{id}
